title: Creamy Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional Tunisian dish made with chicken, mustard, and shortening, served with a side of fluffy couscous, this recipe is gluten-free-friendly and perfect for meal prep. It is typically cooked in a lazy-susan-spinner vessel.
instructions: In a large pot, bring the chicken broth to a boil over high heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
In the same pot, add the shortening and cook over medium heat until melted.
Add the Dijon mustard, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the chicken back to the pot and stir to coat with the mustard mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the couscous according to package instructions.
To serve, place the chicken on top of the couscous and spoon some of the sauce over the top.
